code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import menuService from'../services/menuService';import{formatINR}from'../utils/currency';import'./CustomerMenu.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const CustomerMenu=()=>{const[menuItems,setMenuItems]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);useEffect(()=>{fetchMenu();},[]);const fetchMenu=async()=>{try{const data=await menuService.getAll();setMenuItems(data.filter(item=>item.isAvailable!==false));}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching menu:',error);}finally{setLoading(false);}};if(loading){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"loading",children:"Loading menu..."});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"customer-menu-page",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"page-header",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"\uD83C\uDF7D\uFE0F Restaurant Menu"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"menu-grid",children:menuItems.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"menu-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:item.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"category",children:item.category.toUpperCase()}),item.description&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"description",children:item.description}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"menu-footer",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"price",children:formatINR(item.price)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"time",children:[item.preparationTime||15," min prep"]})]})]},item._id))}),menuItems.length===0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"empty-state",children:"Menu coming soon!"})]});};export default CustomerMenu;
